description: Single-module AGP app; qodana.yaml bootstrap accepts SDK licenses and installs platforms;android-34 + build-tools;34.0.0 (the documented customer flow), then Qodana imports + scans. Validates the qodana-android image end to end: build + customer bootstrap + AGP import + scan producing SARIF, with plugins loaded cleanly. Network on (android's accepted cost). NOTE: on this image a valid AGP scan currently reports only platform inspections (e.g. UnstableApiUsage), NOT the AndroidLint family (HardcodedText/ContentDescription) the planted layout defects target — so the assertion is an id-agnostic >=1 floor for now; broadening it to guard the AndroidLint category (QD-11439) is a follow-up once it's confirmed whether AndroidLint should run here.

expectations.reason: The qodana-android image must produce >=1 result when scanning a real AGP project after the customer-style sdkmanager bootstrap — proves the build + bootstrap + AGP import + scan pipeline works end to end. Id-agnostic floor (see the case description re: AndroidLint).

mustNotContain.text: Read access is allowed from inside read-action only
